title: Floral Crumbly Slovakian Potatoes Crockpot Crumble
description: This floral crumbly Slovakian dish features tender floury potatoes and is perfect for meal prepping. Kosher-friendly and easy to prepare.

ingredients.name: 2 lbs (900g) Russet Potatoes
ingredients.notes: Waxy potatoes can be used as a substitute.

instructions: Peel and chop Russet Potatoes into small chunks. Rinse them under cold water to remove any excess dirt.
In a large saucepan, bring vegetable broth and salt to a boil. Add potatoes and cook until they are fork-tender (about 20-30 minutes). Drain well.
Return the drained potatoes to their pan. Stir in butter, chopped dill, and lemon juice. Season with pepper if needed.
Transfer mixture to an 8x8-inch baking dish or crockpot container for slow cooking.
Cook in preheated oven until top is golden brown (about 25 minutes). Serve warm as a side dish.
